objective: Diagnose and rebalance trigger distribution skew in execution layer
background: setupType "trend" accounts for 82% of all simulated trades in the last 7 days (132/161). Skew indicates the scoring engine is over-fitting to one setup pattern.
constraints: Do not delete any SimulatedTrade records
Do not lower scoring thresholds arbitrarily
Do not modify live position sizing without approval
Do not modify trading thresholds or strategy parameters
Do not require live broker connection
acceptance_tests: Root cause of trigger skew identified (scoring weight, signal density, or filtering bias)
Scoring weights reviewed and documented with rationale
Trigger distribution rebalanced so no single setupType > 60% of weekly trades
required_outputs: Root cause of trigger skew identified (scoring weight, signal density, or filtering bias)
Scoring weights reviewed and documented with rationale
Trigger distribution rebalanced so no single setupType > 60% of weekly trades
forbidden_changes: Do not delete any SimulatedTrade records
Do not lower scoring thresholds arbitrarily
Do not modify live position sizing without approval
handoff_questions: Did you verify each acceptance criterion with evidence?
